# Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and what economic or product question does it serve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, `npm run build` pass in `apps/web`
- [ ] `python3 pipelines/validate/validate_processed.py` passes (if data changed)
- [ ] New metrics/models document definition, formula, source, and limitations
- [ ] No secrets, no fabricated data, no unattributed sources
- [ ] Mobile layout checked (no horizontal overflow)
